58:
Overcome by the ocean, are they? Seduced by the sand? With <Emphasis>me</Emphasis> waiting? <Emphasis>Me</Emphasis>, who paid so dearly to see their unparalleled undulations...?
Well, how delightful! They are true artistes, as beautiful inside as they are out!
